feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Replicate Business Partner Address from SAP ERP : OBJ_TYPE is filtered on BUS1006001.
entry.content:
In the standard iflow 'Replicate Business Partner Address from SAP ERP' and in the mapping 'ERP_COD_BusinessPartnerERPAddressBulkReplicateRequest' BusinessPartnerERPAddressReplicateRequestMessage field is mapped to OBJ_TYPE when it is not equal to BUS1006001

However the ADRMAS03 IDOC generated as same OBJ_TYPE. and thus the iflow fails.

Does this require extra configuration on SAP side to set a different OBJ_TYPE?

entry.title: item code being replace to nearest item from item master data
entry.content:
Hi,

In item master, there are item code ABC & DEF.

When user key in AB, SAP automatically filled up to ABC.

When user key in DE, SAP automatically filled up DEF.

Customer is using copy table and it will filled up a lot of wrong item code.

Any setting to turn off or it is system behavior? Any idea to over come other than key in the correct item code in SAP master data?

Please help.

Thank you.

Best regards,

Tan Su Hsiang

entry.title: How to Block AR Invoice Based on Due Date and Counter Date
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I am about to do a simple task in my organization to block creating or updating or saving AR Invoices when due date and counter date is more than Customers Payment Terms + 10 Days. i have created simple Transaction Notification it fails to block the transaction. Here my code 

IF(@object_type = '17') and (@transaction_type in ('A', 'U'))

begin

IF Exists (SELECT T0.[DocEntry] FROM

OINV T0 INNER JOIN OCTG T1 ON T0.[GroupNum] = T1.[GroupNum]

WHERE DATEDIFF(DAY,T0.[U_CounterDate],T0.[DocDueDate]) > (T1.[ExtraDays] + 10) and T0.Docentry= @List_of_cols_val_tab_del )

Begin

SET @error = 1001

SET @error_message = 'You Cannot not add Counter date more than 10 Days. Please See Administrator!'

End

End

entry.title: UOM KG TO NOS Items per unit decimal 6 digits Issue in inventory Qty
entry.content:
Our Customer have requirement of Purchasing Items in KGs and Inventory will be Nos and they want to issue to production as Nos.We are using UOM Group definition to achieve this 1Nos=54 Kgs so Item per unit is taking in system automatically as 0.018519 6 digits but our Qty decimal is 5 digits 

But the system is taking the conversion in nos as 3.92603 decimal for below scenario we tried to change decimal of qty to 6 digits but it remains same

 

PO
Item NoQtyUOM
TUBE260kGS
GRPO
Item NoQtyUOM
TUBE212kGS

We want to round off this to 4 Nos since we cant use in decimal value to production.

Please provide solution for the above scenario and advise us how to handle this in SAP B1

entry.title: Purchase expenses (LANDED COST) are borne by the buyer and paid in cash. How do I deal?
entry.content:
HELLO EVERYONE  I wish you a nice day ..

I have this scenario how to do it inside SAP B1  If you use freight, the supplier’s balance will become (the value of the goods + the shipping value). Correct? Sometimes when purchasing goods, I am the one who pays the shipping costs in cash ( for example, to the driver who brings the materials. How do I deal?) (the supplier’s account is not affected. His balance remains only the value of the goods).So I think it is more correct to use LANDED COST . It is assumed that I have two accounts affected in addition to the inventory account, which are (the transportation expense account and the cash account). How do I handle this scenario and apply it in SAP B1?

let us take an example that I applied in SAP B1, which is that I created a GRPO document with a value of 150,000, so the journal entry was like this:

Dr:inventory ACC

Cr. GRNI ACC

NOW I bears the transportation cost for these goods, and I paid them directly in cash. The transportation expenses were 10,000. The journal entry appeared like this when creating a landing cost document:

Dr:inventory ACC

Cr:Transportation Expenses ACC

In this case, firstly, the cash accounts did not move with a value of 10,000, and also in the expenses account a credit appeared. Isn’t a Debited supposed to appear and the cash accounts move? I'm sure there's a mistake I made, but I don't know where. If so, can you explain how to handle this scenario within SAP B1? Thank you

entry.title: Enable faster import in DTW after enable authentication service
entry.content:
Hi expert

I have problem with faster import in DTW when i enable service authentication.

entry.title: Need to upload Withholding Tax data AP Invoice DTW
entry.content:
Dear all,

Kindly suggest the template format for the AP Invoice data with Withholding Tax DTW format.

How can I upload the Withholding Tax data via DTW?

SAP Business One

 

regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: JobService en SAP B1 última versión
entry.content:
Good morning, is there any news about this issue in the new SQL version?

Thank you.

entry.title: Pick lists into one A/R Invoice
entry.content:
Hi,

One of our partners has two sales orders, which include two pick lists. Both pick lists are ready for invoicing, and when we select the two pick lists, SAP 'd create two invoices for some reason. All data is the same on the two sales orders, only the items differ.
What is the condition for SAP to combine the pick lists of the same customers into one invoice?

Thanks in advance.

Adam

entry.title: FRANCE LOCALIZATION PRICE AFTER DISCOUNT NOT EDITABLE
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are new to france Localization database creation and recently we encountered issue in price after discount column in marketing documents.

We want to change the price after discount value but we cant able to change it since its not active in form settings and field is not editable where as same field is editable in India Localization.

Please let me know any settings is required to make the column active please refer attachment and advise us.

entry.title: How to capture the event of a user pressing Ctrl+A to clear a SAP B1 form's fields
entry.content:
I am trying to capture the event of a user pressing Ctrl+A to clear a SAP Business One form's fields when that form is in focus/active.

I have tried the below but it is not catching the event.

if (pVal.FormTypeEx == "CDD" && pVal.EventType == SAPbouiCOM.BoEventTypes.et_KEY_DOWN && pVal.Modifiers == SAPbouiCOM.BoModifiersEnum.mt_CTRL && pVal.CharPressed == 065)
{
    //code
}

How do I accomplish this?

Regards,

entry.title: SBO Mail not working in New installation 10.0 FP2402
entry.content:
Hi there.

I have prepared a new server to migrate our installation from WS2012+SQL2016 and SBO 10.0 FP2208 to WS2022+SQL2019 to SBO 10.0 FP2402 and then FP2405.

The installation and migration process was all correct.

Problem: SboMail and alert system. They do not work.

I have reviewed installation notes, reinstalled, SAP notes and nothing solves the problem.

Sending emails from the server from sqlmail works ok (from the transaction notification in sap database as well).

Sending emails from the B1if also works correctly.

Only from SAP it is not possible.

The same mailbox and configuration everywhere.

It can also be sent from SAP and through Outlook, except for the alert system.

Checking the operating system event viewer, I have an error saying event 62, source SBO Mail. The component causing this event is not installed on the local computer or the installation is corrupted.

What could we be missing from the configuration?

What could we be missing in the installation?

The Windows service is working without errors and the system and database configurations are correct, without errors of any kind.

entry.title: Internal Reconciliation of Journal Entries
entry.content:
Besides not displaying the transaction on the Account Balance window (when option is ticked), does using the "Internal Reconciliation" function against offsetting Journal Entries have a negative impact?

E.g. I create an accrual for an expected cost and then do a reversing entry when the actual invoice is posted.  The journal entries remain "unreconciled" but the account balance is not affected due to the reversing entry.

entry.title: How to Split a Sales Order into 2 different Customer Deliveries Invoices with different prices
entry.content:
We are using SAP Business One Version 10 FP 2108 on Windows Server 2019 and MSSQL 2017.

We have a Government  requirement for one of our customers as follows:

We have a Sales Order of Item Z  Quantity 100.

The Delivery and Invoice of 70%  should go to Customer A with different Price and another

Delivery and Invoice of 30%  should go to Customer B with different Price.

The reference should be to the same Sales Order and Inventory Stock should be removed as 100. 

Has anyone come across this scenario or have a solution or workaround.

entry.title: ADD NEW ROW IN (REQUEST FOR QUOTATION)RFQ SAP B1
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I would like to add a row 'Discount' in Request for Quotation (RFQ) so that when a vendor opens the link they will be able to view and fill the field.

entry.title: Eliminar Documentos Pendientes de Autorizacion
entry.content:
Buen día a todos,

Tengo una Orden de Venta con Status Pendiente de Autorización, sin embargo, no la puedo Cerrar ni Cancelar desde la transacción ni desde el informe de Status de Autorización.

Me pueden ayudar con alguna otra alternativa o algún Query. 

Gracias.

entry.title: Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction '' (AWOR)
entry.content:
Hello,

We developed an addon that automate the production order posting process by fetch the [Released] POs and show them as a form, and has a button to select all/dissellect in order to release and receive and complete production process in batch.

But the case is that; after installing this addon, we became unable to perform any action on the Production Order doctype, whenever try to post, duplicate PO or change the status for existing ones, we're getting this error:

Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction '' (AWOR)

In order to troubleshoot this issue, we tried the following but got no solution:

  1. Delete the addon file from Extension Manager, SAP B1 Client, related addon file in Windows Explorer
  2. The Transaction Notification SP has no code or modifications
  3. The PO screen has no FMS
  4. As the addon was installed on a sub Database Server from the main database server, we deleted that Database Server from Control Center in SLD, deleted all related databases include SBO-COMMON, deleted the SQL instance itself and all other related files and temp files in the machine
  5. Reinstall brandnew SQL instance, SLD Database Server
  6. Compared the stored procedures in the SLD databases between 2 different versions one before installing the addon and another after installing it but there was no any difference
  7. Compared the storoed procedures in the SBO-COMMON database between 2 different versions one before installing the addon and another after installing it but there was no any difference

What would be solution for this case?

Regards

entry.title: SAP B1 SDK Load system form from xml - form already exists
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I have saved a system form with extra controls as XML. I am then trying to load the XML and get the following error: Form - already exists [66000-11]. Form Unique Id : 'F_31

This is the code I am using:

private void UpdateFormByXML(string sFileName, string sFormUID)
        {
            try
            {
                string sXPath = "Application//forms//action//form//@uid";
                //string sPath = System.Environment.CurrentDirectory + "\\";
                string sPath = System.IO.Directory.GetParent(System.Windows.Forms.Application.StartupPath).ToString();
                sPath = System.IO.Directory.GetParent(sPath).ToString();

                System.Xml.XmlDocument xDoc = new System.Xml.XmlDocument();

                //xDoc.Load(sPath + sFileName);
                xDoc.Load(sPath + "\\" + sFileName);

                System.Xml.XmlNode xNode = xDoc.SelectSingleNode(sXPath);
                xNode.InnerText = sFormUID;

                string sXML = xDoc.InnerXml.ToString();

                globals.SBO_Application.LoadBatchActions(ref sXML);
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                globals.SBO_Application.SetStatusBarMessage(ex.Message, SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, true);
            }
        }

 

 

                       if (pVal.FormType == 60150 & pVal.EventType != SAPbouiCOM.BoEventTypes.et_FORM_UNLOAD && pVal.Before_Action == true)
                        {
                            oCECForm = globals.SBO_Application.Forms.GetFormByTypeAndCount(pVal.FormType, pVal.FormTypeCount);

                            if (pVal.EventType == SAPbouiCOM.BoEventTypes.et_FORM_LOAD && pVal.Before_Action == true)
                            {
                                UpdateFormByXML("CEC.xml", pVal.FormUID);
                            }
                        }

 

Could someone please help?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction '' (AWOR)
entry.content:
Hello,

We developed an addon that automate the production order posting process by fetch the [Released] POs and show them as a form, and has a button to select all/dissellect in order to release and receive and complete production process in batch.

But the case is that; after installing this addon, we became unable to perform any action on the Production Order doctype, whenever try to post, duplicate PO or change the status for existing ones, we're getting this error:

Could not commit transaction: Error -1 detected during transaction '' (AWOR)

In order to troubleshoot this issue, we tried the following but got no solution:

  1. Delete the addon file from Extension Manager, SAP B1 Client, related addon file in Windows Explorer
  2. The Transaction Notification SP has no code or modifications
  3. The PO screen has no FMS
  4. As the addon was installed on a sub Database Server from the main database server, we deleted that Database Server from Control Center in SLD, deleted all related databases include SBO-COMMON, deleted the SQL instance itself and all other related files and temp files in the machine
  5. Reinstall brandnew SQL instance, SLD Database Server
  6. Compared the stored procedures in the SLD databases between 2 different versions one before installing the addon and another after installing it but there was no any difference
  7. Compared the storoed procedures in the SBO-COMMON database between 2 different versions one before installing the addon and another after installing it but there was no any difference

What would be solution for this case?

Regards

entry.title: SAP B1 Continuous Stock with Germany Localization
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we are an international group that is setting up a new company in Germany and we need to start a new DB in SAP as a test company for the German company.

While we are waiting for the meeting with the tax consultant, we would like to start the new DB and I'm asking the community people here located in Germany what Inventory Management system you use in SAP B1 with German localization. In Germany do you typically use Continuous Stock (perpetual inventory with accounting postings) or you use periodic inventory? And what Evaluation method do you typically use in Germany? Standard, Average or FIFO? Is the Standard method even allowed in Germany?

Thank you guys!
